description: Stop + remove a deployed body container and deregister its roster row. The durable fleet-ledgers mirror is preserved — the governance domain is ephemeral, its provenance is not. Idempotent: a body already gone is still a success.
rules: docker stop + rm WITHOUT -f (oversight-clean, mirrors cws-deploy:down)
deregisters by name from ~/.cyberware/fleet.json atomically — config write only, never the repo
never deletes the durable run mirror — provenance outlives the container
usage: NODE_NAME (the container/roster name). Optional FLEET_FILE. Output: ${RECORD_STORE}/down.json.
limitation: Needs a running Docker daemon to remove the container.
